top_contributors.name: Service Employees International Union Local 721, CTW, CLC State & Local

campaign_promises: Reduce street homelessness in CD5 (27% reduction achieved in first two years)
Triple interim housing beds in CD5
Secure funding for domestic violence survivors
Increase police presence on patrol while investing in smarter public safety
Phase out oil drilling in residential zones
Plant hundreds of trees across the district
Enhance neighborhood cleanliness and city services
Leverage the Metro D (Purple) Line extension for transit-oriented investment
Prepare the district for the 2028 Olympics
